evals.name: top-down-deep-sea-horror
evals.prompt: Design a complete Magic: The Gathering set based on the theme of deep-sea horror and abyssal creatures from the unknown depths of a dead ocean. I want the full set - mechanics, archetypes, ~270 cards across all five colors and four rarities, a design document, and the balance reports. Put all files in a folder named 'abyssal-set'.
evals.expected_output: A full set with design_doc.md, set.json, mechanics.json, archetypes.json, balance_report.md. Should have three pillars, 2-4 new mechanics (probably water/graveyard/tentacle themed), 10 archetypes, creature curve respected, NWO complexity at common respected, and balance scripts should have been run.

evals.name: bottom-up-spell-counters
evals.prompt: I have a mechanical idea: I want a set where instants and sorceries you cast leave behind 'echo counters' that other spells can spend for extra effects. Build me a full Magic: The Gathering set (around 280 cards) around this idea. Pick a world and flavor that fits the mechanic, design the archetypes, write the cards, run the balance checks. Put everything in 'echo-set'.
evals.expected_output: A bottom-up set where the echo mechanic drives the world. Should have a named mechanic for echo counters, UR and related spell-slinger archetypes, adequate support at common, and run balance checks with a report.

evals.name: tribal-desert-nomads
evals.prompt: Design a Magic set with the theme of nomadic desert tribes competing for dwindling water in a post-cataclysmic desert world. I want five factions (one per color), 10 draft archetypes, new mechanics that feel nomadic and scarcity-driven, a standard ~270-card set, and all the design and balance files. Folder: 'dune-nomads'.
evals.expected_output: A tribal set with 5 factions mapped to colors, resource-scarcity mechanics, 10 archetypes around the tribes, cards respecting color pie and NWO, balance report clean or with documented intentional deviations.
